title: Build Real AI Apps With Dify

modules.title: What Dify Is and What You Can Actually Build With It
modules.sub: Get a clear map of Dify's real possibilities and limits
modules.description: You explore what Dify is, how it fits into the no-code AI landscape, and what kinds of apps people actually ship with it. By the end you have a concrete sense of which of your own ideas are a good match for the platform.

modules.title: Your First App in Under an Hour: Walkthrough and Key Concepts
modules.sub: Launch a working app and learn the core building blocks
modules.description: You follow a guided walkthrough to build and run your first Dify app from scratch, picking up the key concepts — prompts, models, and app types — as you go. You finish the module with something real deployed, not just a demo.

modules.title: Designing Workflows That Do Something Useful for You
modules.sub: Chain steps together to automate a real personal task
modules.description: You move beyond single-prompt apps and learn how to design multi-step workflows that handle real logic — conditions, loops, and handoffs between steps. You apply this by building a workflow around a task you actually want to automate.

modules.title: Connecting Data, APIs, and Tools to Make It Powerful
modules.sub: Pull in outside information so your app knows more
modules.description: You connect your app to external sources — uploaded documents, knowledge bases, or live APIs — so it can do more than a plain language model can on its own. You decide which integrations make sense for your specific app and wire at least one of them up.

modules.title: Where Dify Falls Short and How to Work Around It
modules.sub: Spot the gaps early and plan smarter around them
modules.description: You take an honest look at Dify's limitations — scaling, customization ceilings, cost, and edge cases — so you can make informed decisions about your project. You leave with a clear-eyed plan for what to build in Dify, what to handle elsewhere, and how to keep your app useful long-term.

synopsis: Dify lets you build real, working AI-powered apps without writing code — chatbots, automation tools, internal assistants — and this course gets you productive with it fast. You'll go from zero to a finished, usable app by the end, with a clear sense of what Dify can and can't do for your goals.
rationale: No-code AI app builders like Dify are opening up product and entrepreneurship opportunities for young adults who aren't developers, but the learning curve keeps most people from getting past the first screen.
learning_outcome: Learners can build and deploy a functional AI-powered app in Dify that solves a real problem in their own life, work, or side project.
source_signals: Ex-GitHub CEO launches a new developer platform for AI agents
Generative AI coding tools and agents do not work for me
